extraction.one_line_summary: LAENGEN Vegard Stake attacked the break with 18km remaining, gained 10 seconds on the final climb, and won solo by 38 seconds.
tactical_patterns: LAENGEN gained time uphill on final climb despite peloton chasing, revealing rare TT specialist climbing strength under fatigue.
GC teams Ineos/Bora/QuickStep failed to close 6-minute gap despite combined firepower, suggesting break cooperation trumps disorganized chase.
Attack launched at 18km, precisely when peloton commitment wavered between stage chase and sprint preparation.

rider_signals.LAENGEN Vegard Stake: positive: TT specialist showed unexpected climbing resilience under heat and distance, adding 10s on final climb while under pressure
rider_signals.WILLIAMS Stephen: positive: defended yellow jersey successfully despite 6-minute deficit to break, team tactics worked without personal effort
